decision.manipulation_blocker: TSIE is labeled buy/sell/flat regime data, not direct event/order-lifecycle/L2 manipulation evidence.
decision.next_action: Run a completion-eligible full-data MainRegimeV3Candidate gate or switch to a smaller direct-labeled cross-market source, and acquire direct manipulation event/order-lifecycle labels.

feature_policy.weak_or_trap_labels: WEAK SELL, BEAR TRAP, BULL TRAP, and WEAK BUY remain UnknownOrMixed for this active expanded-root gate.

objective: Evaluate external direct-labeled TSIE IDX strong buy/sell/flat labels as expanded root evidence under unchanged 95 gates.

source.readme_excerpt: 0| STRONG SELL| High-confidence bearish breakdown | 3| FLAT / NOISE| Sideways / low volatility | 6| STRONG BUY| High-confidence breakout | This is not future-leakage-based labeling. | - Dataset is highly imbalanced (dominant "FLAT / NOISE" class)
